titles.title: Child Care Payment Integrity and Fraud Accountability Act of 2026
Child Care Payment Integrity and Fraud Accountability Act
Child Care Payment Integrity and Fraud Accountability Act of 2026
To amend the Child Care and Development Block Grant Act of 1990 to require States to account for fraudulent payments made under such Act.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 19 - 15.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Education and Workforce. H. Rept. 119-586.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 506.

committee.name: House Education and Workforce
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
